source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Fresh product UI typography with strong English hierarchy and Japanese typography guidance for Noto Sans JP body text, compact labels, dashboard numbers, tables, command search, and readable status messages.
layout: Fresh 8px-radius product grids, leaf-vein dividers, rib-yellow focus states, emerald navigation, pale grove panels, restrained shadows, compact data density, and tropical-grove neutral spacing rhythm.

prompts.label: Transparent banana leaf motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only one banana leaf, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A fresh tropical banana leaf with broad emerald green blade, natural long central rib in warm yellow-green, subtle yellow edging, visible fine veins, slight organic curl, and a clean botanical silhouette. Accurate plant texture, crisp leaf edges, realistic surface sheen.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the leaf. The leaf may be diagonal so the full shape is visible.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural emerald, rib yellow, and edge highlight detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no branch, no fruit, no landscape, no decorative background, no second leaf, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Banana Leaf light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Banana Leaf, derived from the visible banana leaf cutout reference.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from a fresh tropical banana leaf: glossy emerald green leaf blade, warm yellow-green central rib, subtle yellow edging, fine parallel vein lines, deep tropical grove shadow greens, and humid cream neutrals. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the leaf and tropical grove.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide if available. Keep all labels large and readable.
Required visible sections: Morphous Banana Leaf, Banana Leaf, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, charts, data widgets, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius examples, border and shadow tokens.
Visual style: fresh layout system for product dashboards and data tools, precise grid, 8px card radius, leaf-vein dividers, rib-yellow focus rings, emerald primary actions, pale grove surfaces, restrained yellow edge accents, crisp modern UI components.
Typography: include English UI examples and Japanese typography examples using short readable Japanese labels; multilingual product UI guidance, compact labels, data tables, and headings.
Text constraints: use short readable section labels and short UI labels only. Avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no stock UI kit look, no beige-heavy palette, no neon, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of Morphous Banana Leaf.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Banana Leaf dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Banana Leaf that feels like the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible banana leaf cutout and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the same component language, 8px radius system, fresh layout density, leaf-vein dividers, rib-yellow focus rings, emerald primary actions, yellow edge accents, tropical grove neutrals, and typography hierarchy.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide if available. Keep all labels large and readable.
Required visible sections: Morphous Banana Leaf, Banana Leaf, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: dark shadcn/tweakcn-compatible buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, charts, data widgets, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius examples, border and shadow tokens.
Visual details: deepest tropical grove green background, readable pale leaf-cream text, card surfaces in dark chlorophyll green, emerald highlights, rib-yellow rings, restrained edge-yellow warnings, vein-line borders, subtle glossy leaf texture overlays, crisp professional product dashboard layout.
Typography: include English UI examples and Japanese typography examples using short readable Japanese labels; compact labels and data tables should remain scan-friendly in dark mode.
Text constraints: use short readable section labels and short UI labels only. Avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon palette, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic blue/purple gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of Morphous Banana Leaf.
